changelog: Polish 12.6 a11y second-pass: new js/focus-trap.js helper exposes window.FocusTrap.activate/deactivate/isActive — wraps Tab/Shift+Tab inside a modal, restores focus to the previously-focused element on close, optional onEscape callback. Wired into employee.php payLinkModal (open/close paths in js/employee-payments.js call activate/deactivate). Modal markup gets role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby pointing at the now-id'd <h3>. Cart and menu composition modals will follow in a separate commit.
